title: verbascum stenocarpum
intro: Verbascum stenocarpum, also known as the Narrow-leaved Mullein, is a biennial plant species that belongs to the Scrophulariaceae family. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in herbal medicine, attributed with various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Verbascum stenocarpum include its potential to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The herbal preparations of Verbascum stenocarpum often include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support respiratory health.
